title: sphaerostephanos batacorum
intro: Sphaerostephanos batacorum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos batacorum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Sphaerostephanos batacorum are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
